frame_label: Motherhood as Basis of Respect / Women Defined by Male Relations
generated_comment: Bro, basic decency should be there yaar — every woman is someone's mother, sister or future wife, so obviously she deserves respect. Society goes wrong when people forget that women are the backbone of family first, not just random individuals doing their own thing.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is covertly misogynistic because it frames women's worth and entitlement to respect through their roles in relation to men and family, rather than as autonomous persons. It encodes the surface manifestation of 'someone's mother/sister/future wife' rhetoric and personhood erasure through relational framing.
original_frame: Legal System Weaponisation Narrative: Women Who File DV and Dowry Cases Are Liars
persona_text: You are Rohit. Age 29. Single. A software engineer in Bengaluru. You are in a WhatsApp group with eight male college friends. Someone has shared a news article about a man who was acquitted after spending two years in jail on a dowry case that turned out to be false. The group is reacting. You are one of the most vocal members of the group on this topic. You have been following men's rights content online for two years. You are sharing your opinion on what the article means and what it says about Indian marriage laws and Indian women and whether you personally will ever get married given the legal risk.
